mission: State the tightest exact remaining Paper 35 frontier after all current-stack reductions.

theorem_1_exact_scalar_frontier.statement: After the full current-stack reduction, the remaining Paper 35 baryogenesis frontier is no longer an open family of operator sectors. It is exactly the following residual data: one CP-even magnitude pair, one CP-odd boundary scalar, and one support-side scalar production history.
exact_remaining_data: CP-odd boundary scalar: Q5 = N_+ - N_-
support-side scalar production history: lambda(R), equivalently theta(R)

theorem_2_current_stack_values_and_targe.statement: On the current stack, the CP-odd scalar vanishes, while the support-side scalar history remains completely open except for its exact target at the source crossing.

theorem_3_no_further_reduction.statement: No further theorem-grade reduction remains on the current stack. Any positive Paper 35 closure must derive at least one nonzero boundary pseudoscalar Q5, one CP-even magnitude selector for (M1, m_tilde1), and one support-side scalar production history lambda(R) or theta(R).

final_boundary.safe_statement: The Paper 35 baryogenesis program is now reduced to an exact residual list of scalar data. There is no remaining hidden operator-class ambiguity on the current stack.
